purpose: Record the intended 8xMI350 DeepSeek-V4 Flash TorchTitan canary using MORI dispatch/combine, AITER fused-MoE forward, and safe-default routed padded backward.

gpu_availability.pid_note: rocm-smi reported PID 4593 using 0 DRM devices; no GPU-resident workload was present.

check_config.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh check-config

run.command_shape: IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 RUN_ID=torchtitan_direct_dsv4_mori_aiter_routed_padded_vjp_8x_s4096_gbs128_steps2_acfull_bwdcachedefault_20260602 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_VISIBLE_DEVICES=0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=full CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_REQUIRE_IDLE_GPUS=true MASTER_PORT=29564 launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run

target_comparison.step1_read: Below target at 1910-1913 tok/GPU/s and 34.26-34.31 s/step; this is the warmup step.
target_comparison.step2_read: Above target at 2645 tok/GPU/s, 21160 tok/node/s, and 24.78 s/step.
target_comparison.read: The intended 8xMI350 target shape now passes as a correctness-first systems canary and exceeds the normalized throughput target on the second step, but it is still guarded dense-fallback systems evidence rather than final sparse-MLA/LightningIndexer performance.

limitations: The compressed DeepSeek-V4 Flash attention layers still fall back over the sparse sequence threshold.
The owner-rank MoE VJP remains the padded PyTorch local VJP, not final fused MoE backward.
The second step peaks at 248.68 GiB on some ranks and reports four CUDA allocation retry warnings.
TorchTitan MFU remains far below the Ascend MFU target because current FLOP accounting and guarded fallback path are not the final fused sparse-MLA/LI plus fused-MoE-backward path.
read: Safe-default MORI routed padded VJP now carries to the intended 8x S4096 GBS128 shape. This establishes the first 8x DeepSeek-V4 Flash target-shape MORI+AITER two-step canary with loss movement and clean process-group teardown.
